subject: [PATCH 17/24] nfsd: allow nfsd4_encode_fattr4_change() to work with no export

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch allows the nfsd4_encode_fattr4_change function to work even when there is no export available, which can happen in certain callback scenarios such as CB_NOTIFY. This is safe because nfsd will not grant a delegation on the V4 root. The change involves modifying the condition under which an error is returned from this function.
